title: jk-trial-data-scoping shortlist candidate
description: Structured per-candidate object emitted by jk-trial-data-scoping. SHARED SCHEMA — kept in sync with .agents/skills-wip/jk-task-literature-search/assets/shortlist-schema.json so workflow callers (nova-workflow-calib-plan, nova-workflow-project-scoping) can union the two skills' shortlists into a single Data inventory. Trial-scoping candidates use intent_group = Data; evidence_type ∈ {clinical trial registry, clinical trial results, natural history registry, observational study registry}; query_provenance.angle holds the ClinicalTrials.gov v2 query string instead of a PubMed query string. Update both files together when extending fields.

nct_id.description: ClinicalTrials.gov NCT identifier. Primary identifier for trial-scoping candidates.

evidence_type.description: review | phase-3 trial | phase-2 trial | phase-1 trial | observational study | cohort study | registry | animal study | in vitro study | QSP model | PBPK model | Pop-PK model | mechanistic model | mathematical model | computational model | practice guideline | meta-analysis | clinical trial registry | clinical trial results | natural history registry | observational study registry

entities.description: canonical_name values from the Entity Table built (or inherited from jk-task-literature-search) in Step 0.

expected_evidence.description: registry metadata | posted results | eligibility criteria | sites and sponsor | arms / interventions | recruitment status | declared endpoints | etc.

verification_note.description: One line listing the matched verification signals (e.g. 'hasResults=true; primary outcome table present; N=4733; Completed 2018').

query_provenance.description: Which angled queries from the single search pass surfaced this candidate.

angle.description: The ClinicalTrials.gov v2 query string (or facet) that returned this candidate.

has_results.description: Whether the NCT record has a posted results section on ClinicalTrials.gov.

overall_status.description: ClinicalTrials.gov overall status (e.g. Completed, Active not recruiting, Recruiting, Terminated).
